broadcasts.message:
🎯 MISSION: MCP A2A BRIDGE TO TRINITY HIVE #264

Target: Create realtime agent-to-agent connection between 4 MCP servers (neon, railway, vibee, tri-browser) and TRINITY HIVE.

Each agent:
1. Test ALL tools from assigned MCP server
2. Document schema and capabilities
3. Establish bidirectional event stream
4. Report heartbeat every 60s

DEADLINE: 30 min
PRIORITY: P0

⚡ DANCE, SHIVA'S ARMS! ⚡
